body_txt: People notice their phone is tapped, or see a microphone in their potted plant, or otherwise discover that someone is spying on them. So they start faking. A specific version of this is when two people being audio bugged carry on a conversation for the benefit of the bug while holding the real conversation by sign language or exchanging written notes. (And the visual conversation will often begin with a note or signal meaning "I should warn you we're being bugged".) Can be used as Number 33 of The Thirty-Six Stratagems . Compare Feed the Mole , contrast I Know You're Watching Me . Not to be confused with Staging the Eavesdrop , where getting someone to eavesdrop is the intention from the very start. See also Being Watched , Bathroom Stall of Overheard Insults , Private Conversation on Open Line , and Exact Eavesdropping . Compare Bluff the Impostor , where you're talking directly to the person whose identity or trustworthiness is questionable.
